issue_body:
Build the final export step that lets a creator review the completed long-form episode, choose practical publishing options like platform, resolution, caption burn-in, and show template, then start an export from the same workspace. This is the next missing end-to-end piece: the product already has setup, styling, canvas customization, audio polish, visual moments, and reusable templates, but creators still cannot turn that work into a publishable episode.

## Acceptance (definition of done)
A creator can open an Export or Publish step from the existing app, see a coherent final episode summary using the selected speakers, visual style, audio polish choices, visual moments, and show template, choose export options for long-form publishing, start the export, and see a completed ready-to-download state. The flow must handle missing required choices with clear creator-facing messages and be covered by the existing verification command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs.

---
This is the current active step for this product. The maintainer will only merge a pull request that completes THIS step and demonstrably works. Open a PR that closes this issue.

_Why this step now: Export is the most valuable next foundation because it completes the core creator journey from imported raw tracks to a finished episode. Without it, the existing editors improve the episode but do not deliver the publishable output promised by the vision._
